title: Magical Charred Thai Stir Fry
description: A quick and delicious stir fry made with charred vegetables and a hint of magical spice. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger; stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add charred red bell peppers and broccoli; stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add chopped collard greens and stir-fry until wilted.
Add thai basil leaves and stir-fry for another minute.
Pour in pad thai sauce and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until the sauce is bubbly and slightly thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional thai basil leaves, if desired.
